# Tolworth Intensive Driving Courses — Kings Driving Centre

> DVSA Approved intensive driving courses in Tolworth & Surbiton, part of Kings Driving Centre, for learners who want to pass quickly. Manual and automatic. All abilities and experience levels welcome. Instructors teach in English, German, Hindi, Urdu and Punjabi. Courses run from 10 to 30 hours, with urgent cover for learners who already have a test date at the Tolworth or Morden test centres.

## Courses
- [10 Hour Intensive Course](https://kingsdrivingcentre.co.uk/tolworth-intensive-driving-courses/#courses): Top-up course for learners close to test-ready. £741.
- [15 Hour Intensive Course](https://kingsdrivingcentre.co.uk/tolworth-intensive-driving-courses/#courses): £1,016.
- [20 Hour Intensive Course](https://kingsdrivingcentre.co.uk/tolworth-intensive-driving-courses/#courses): The most-booked package. £1,251.
- [30 Hour Intensive Course](https://kingsdrivingcentre.co.uk/tolworth-intensive-driving-courses/#courses): Full beginner-to-test programme. £1,862.
- [Urgent Test Cover](https://kingsdrivingcentre.co.uk/tolworth-intensive-driving-courses/#book): Priority booking for learners with a near-term practical test.

## Areas
- [Tolworth](https://kingsdrivingcentre.co.uk/tolworth-intensive-driving-courses/tolworth.html): Home test centre (Douglas Road, KT6 7RZ), Tolworth Roundabout, Hook Junction, the Scilly Isles, Claygate and Long Ditton routes.
- [Surbiton](https://kingsdrivingcentre.co.uk/tolworth-intensive-driving-courses/surbiton.html): Our office base, St Philip's Rd.
- [Morden](https://kingsdrivingcentre.co.uk/tolworth-intensive-driving-courses/morden.html): Second home test centre, with real first-time pass photos.
- [Kingston upon Thames](https://kingsdrivingcentre.co.uk/tolworth-intensive-driving-courses/kingston-upon-thames.html): Town-centre driving, tests take place at the nearby Tolworth centre.
- [New Malden](https://kingsdrivingcentre.co.uk/tolworth-intensive-driving-courses/new-malden.html): Quiet residential roads for building early confidence.
- [Putney](https://kingsdrivingcentre.co.uk/tolworth-intensive-driving-courses/putney.html): South Circular and Putney Bridge driving.
- [Full areas list](https://kingsdrivingcentre.co.uk/tolworth-intensive-driving-courses/#areas): Also covers Chessington, Worcester Park, Esher, Epsom, Sutton and the surrounding area.

## Key facts
- [Learner resources](https://kingsdrivingcentre.co.uk/tolworth-intensive-driving-courses/resources.html): Official DVSA 'show me, tell me' questions, the Ready to Pass scheme, and UK licence steps.
- [Blog](https://kingsdrivingcentre.co.uk/tolworth-intensive-driving-courses/blog.html): Recent pass stories, local test route guides, and learner advice, updated regularly.
- [Languages spoken](https://kingsdrivingcentre.co.uk/tolworth-intensive-driving-courses/#languages): English, German, Hindi, Urdu, Punjabi.
- [Payment options](https://kingsdrivingcentre.co.uk/tolworth-intensive-driving-courses/#courses): Deposit, full payment, or instalments via Klarna.
- [FAQ](https://kingsdrivingcentre.co.uk/tolworth-intensive-driving-courses/#faq): Course length, payment, languages, urgent test cover and areas covered.
